sections.heading: Controller
sections.body:
Marc Neumann, Schwabenstraße 47, 71101 Schönaich, Germany
E-mail: marc.neumann.neu@gmail.com

sections.heading: Core principle: your data stays on your device
sections.body: SleepLog is an offline app for keeping a 24-hour baby sleep protocol. All data you enter – information about your children (profiles), sleep, wake and feeding events with time and category, and your notes – is stored exclusively locally on your device. Nothing is transmitted to us or third parties. We run no servers, use no analytics, tracking or advertising SDKs, and build no usage profiles. No user account is required and there is no cloud connection.

sections.heading: Health-related data
sections.body: Sleep and feeding logs may constitute health-related data about your child. Because this information is processed exclusively locally on your device and is never transmitted to us, we have no access to it whatsoever. You alone decide what to record and whether and with whom to share it.

sections.heading: Categories and methodology
sections.body: The categories used for recording follow the methodology of the 24-hour sleep protocol (type Kinderspital Zürich). This is solely a methodological reference for structuring your entries; no data is exchanged with Kinderspital Zürich or any other body, and they are not involved in the data processing.

sections.heading: Notifications
sections.body: Any reminders are scheduled and triggered entirely locally on your device. No server connection is used for this. You can revoke the notification permission at any time in the Android settings.

sections.heading: Local backup, PDF export and sharing
sections.body: You can export all your data as a local backup file (JSON) and import it again; you can also generate the protocol as a PDF. These files are created locally on your device and leave your device only if you actively share them via the Android share dialog. You alone decide who receives the file.

sections.heading: Fetching the legal texts
sections.body: To keep the imprint and privacy policy current, the app fetches these texts from a public location (GitHub, raw.githubusercontent.com, operated by GitHub, Inc., USA) at most once every 24 hours. This technically transmits your IP address to GitHub. No app or usage data and no personal data is sent. The fetch is not mandatory: without an internet connection the versions bundled with the app are shown. The legal basis is our legitimate interest in up-to-date mandatory information (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).

sections.heading: Purchase of SleepLog Pro
sections.body: SleepLog Pro is a one-time in-app purchase – not a subscription. Payment is handled exclusively via Google Play Billing. Google, as the payment processor, processes payment and account data in accordance with the Google Privacy Policy (policies.google.com/privacy); we receive no payment data, only the purchase status. This unlock is stored locally on your device.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability and objection, as well as the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection authority. As we store no personal data of yours, you can largely exercise these rights directly in the app and on your device – for example by deleting a child or an entry, or by uninstalling. For any requests you can reach us at the address stated in the imprint.

sections.heading: Deleting data
sections.body: You delete all local data in the app (individual entries or whole child profiles) or by uninstalling the app or via "Clear storage" in the Android app settings.

sections.heading: Changes to this policy
sections.body: This privacy policy will be updated when the app's features change. The current version is always available at this address.
